items.title: Clippers Must Let Bennedict Mathurin Walk After the Kawhi Leonard Trade
items.author: Sports Illustrated
items.body_excerpt: Clippers Must Let Bennedict Mathurin Walk After the Kawhi Leonard Trade Sports Illustrated

items.title: The Los Angeles Clippers have tendered Bennedict Mathurin a qualifying offer, making him a restricted free agent, league sources told HoopsHype. The 24-year-old swingman averaged a career-high 17.6 points last season.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Los Angeles Clippers have tendered Bennedict Mathurin a qualifying offer, making him a restricted free agent, league sources told HoopsHype. The 24-year-old swingman averaged a career-high 17.6 points last season.

items.title: The LA Clippers have extended qualifying offers to Bennedict Mathurin, Jordan Miller, and Kobe Sanders
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
The LA Clippers have extended qualifying offers to Bennedict Mathurin, Jordan Miller, and Kobe Sanders

They will all be restricted free agents

More to come over next few hours

items.title: Bennedict Mathurin Is Among the Losers of Clippers' Draft Pick
items.author: Sports Illustrated
items.body_excerpt: Bennedict Mathurin Is Among the Losers of Clippers' Draft Pick Sports Illustrated

items.title: Keaton Wagler to the Clippers with the Pacers pick. So Wagler, Bennedict Mathurin, Isaiah Jackson, a 2029 unprotected first-round pick, and a 2028 second-round pick (via Dallas) for Ivica Zubac and Kobe Brown.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Keaton Wagler to the Clippers with the Pacers pick. So Wagler, Bennedict Mathurin, Isaiah Jackson, a 2029 unprotected first-round pick, and a 2028 second-round pick (via Dallas) for Ivica Zubac and Kobe Brown.
